Heat a small rondeau over hight heat and add wagyu fat.
Add the chopped up Roasted Shallots and begin caramelizing until dark brown - stirring constantly and using water to deglaze
Once caramelized, deglaze with Mother #2, then add tomatoes
Add the rest of the ingredients to the pan and fully incorporate
Once all components have been added and the sauce is completely hot, remove from heat
Reserve to quart containers and cool in the blast chiller or ice bath
Store in the cooler or freezer
